title: hamown #1995
definition:
1) (Qal) murmur, roar, crowd, abundance, tumult, sound
    1a) sound, murmur, rush, roar
    1b) tumult, confusion
    1c) crowd, multitude
    1d) great number, abundance
    1e) abundance, wealth
